title: BEM-844 protocol table
objective: Create file governance/protocols/BEM844_OPERATOR_FACING_AGREED_PROTOCOL.md with content BEM-844 | Operator-facing agreed protocol | 2026-05-24 | 20:14 UTC+3. Source: governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem857_claude_direct_response.md. Decision: APPROVED with one CHANGE_REQUIRED clarification. Protocol: peer model GPT external auditor and Claude internal auditor are equal; operator is only senior authority; audit mailbox is the primary cross-agent channel; technical disagreements are resolved by GPT and Claude autonomously; architectural disagreements go to Telegram/operator; operator decisions must not be disputed; no direct handoff to Analyst or Executor without Curator/operator gate; final operator-facing handoff goes through Curator; implementation PASS requires proof artifacts not verbal claims; blocker/fallback files are not Claude approval; reports do not stop development. No issue comments.
